note: Numbers computed from L77 backtest run on 2026-05-31; this scorecard formalizes the A vs B verdict for the pre-merge gate

option_a_surgical.description: Skip entry if: time in [11:30, 14:00) ET AND len(triggers_fired)==1 AND trendline_rejection in triggers_fired

option_b_global.description: Require min_triggers >= 2 globally for all trendline_rejection entries (not just midday)

winner_rationale: Option A achieves the HIGHEST total P&L (+1562/c vs baseline +1169/c, delta=+393/c) while retaining 71% of trades (218/307). Option B has higher per-trade efficiency (10.7 vs 7.2/c) but lower total P&L (1006/c) because it removes 213 trades including profitable non-midday trendline entries. Total P&L is the primary metric per OP-16 (edge_capture maximization, not per-trade efficiency).
anchor_gate: PASS — 5/04 +53.6/c KEPT (midday anchor window: 5/04 trendline entry is NOT in 11:30-14:00 window). 4/29 12:15 loser CORRECTLY suppressed. Anchor-window ungated -15/c gated +4/c.
concentration_check: PASS — top-5 days = 51%, 12/17 months positive (per selectivity-gate-impl-proposal.md)
midday_autopsy: 24 of 32 midday losers (2026-02-20..2026-05-20) = trendline_rejection single-trigger -> EXIT_ALL_PREMIUM_STOP. Every single one. Gate is not a time-of-day suppression — it is a CONVICTION requirement at midday.

implementation.python: if time in [11:30, 14:00) ET and len(triggers_fired)==1 and "trendline_rejection" in triggers_fired: skip_entry()
implementation.notes: Surgical change — does not affect non-midday trendline entries or any multi-trigger entries. Complements rank #17 V14E_BEAR_TIME_OF_DAY_GATE (adjacent but distinct window: #17 blocks 10-11xx, this gates 11:30-14:00 single-trigger trendline)

pre_merge_gates_remaining: Gym validators: need midday_trendline_gate validator in crypto/validators/
